name: Steenwijkerland (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal logo — three blue figures and a green swoosh — with the name 'Steenwijkerland'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Steenwijkerland in the province of Overijssel, formed in 2001. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal logo (three figures and a green swoosh) and wordmark 'Steenwijkerland'
